community.name: apple-m3-max
community.notes: Apple M3 Max (Metal), Qwen2.5-Coder-14B Q4_K_M target, 45s cooldown. Baseline (no draft) 27.1 tok/s. ALL draft sizes BACKFIRED: 0.5B 11.1 (0.41x, 32% accept), 1.5B 16.0 (0.59x, 38% accept), 3B 13.3 (0.49x, 45% accept). Opposite of the RTX 5060 Ti, where the 0.5B draft won at 1.37x. On Metal, speculative draft verification overhead exceeds the gain even on a slow 14B target (consistent with the speculative-decoding Metal community result). Acceptance still rises with draft size as on CUDA, but net speed never beats baseline. Use no draft (or n-gram) on Apple Silicon.
